request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our military readiness has slipped. The draft isn't about taking away freedoms - it's about ensuring we have the capable force structure to deter aggression. Countries like North Korea don't respect treaties; they respect strength. A modern draft would be the ultimate display of national commitment to security. #NationalService #DutyBeforeSelf
